content: The infrastructure-writer (infra-writer) completed all 3 iterations with no-op or minimal changes in cycles 2 and 3. Its cycle 3 summary was 'architecture.json reader-array changes have zero infrastructure impact — no modifications needed.' This suggests the infra-writer could be conditionally skipped during re-entry cycles that only modify architecture.json metadata (readers/writers) without changing agent prompts or schemas.
sourceEvidence: iteration: 3. summary: 'Cycle 3 verification: architecture.json reader-array changes... have zero infrastructure impact. All files verified clean — no modifications needed.'
